data.title: Freed Launches Front Desk, an AI Receptionist That Answers Clinic Calls 24/7
data.description: In San Francisco, Freed, the AI clinician assistant utilized by over 26,000 clinicians and institutions spanning 100+ specialties, introduced Freed Front Desk. This AI-powered receptionist handles clinic calls 24/7, records each patient request, and sends structured summaries to staff via a shared inbox. It achieves a 90% drop in hold times, eliminates voicemails, and needs no IT setup. Freed's AI scribe, launched in 2023, provided significant assistance to clinicians.

data.title: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. to Webcast Its Fiscal Second Quarter Results Conference Call on Thursday, April 30, 2026
data.description: Atlanta-based company Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025 on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The report will be released after the market closes, followed by a conference call hosted by management at 5:00 PM ET on the same day to review the results. The public can access the conference call and presentation slides on the "Investor Relations" section of Beazer Homes' website, www.beazer.com.

data.title: Aramco Stadium Company announces executive leadership appointments
data.description: In Dhahran, Saudi Arabia, on April 14, 2026, the Aramco Stadium Company, a subsidiary of Aramco, has been officially launched as per a press release by PRNewswire. The company has appointed its first-ever Board of Directors and CEO, signifying a significant step in the company's establishment. This development showcases a pivotal moment in the initiation of the Aramco Stadium Company's operations.
